FINISH_CAMERA.title: Finish Line Camera
FINISH_CAMERA.description: Point the camera at the finish line, automatically detect crossings and assign times to students.
FINISH_CAMERA.camera-hint: Start the camera, then tap the image to set the virtual finish line.
FINISH_CAMERA.no-camera-permission: Camera access denied. Please enable camera permission in your device settings.
FINISH_CAMERA.set-line-hint: Tap the image to set the finish line
FINISH_CAMERA.no-events-yet: No finish crossings detected yet. Start the session and point the camera at the finish line.
